location_briarwatch_crossroads.name: Briarwatch Crossroads
location_briarwatch_crossroads.description: A stone-walled town crossing where the west road meets the bridge over Briarwatch's narrow river.

location_briarwatch_square.name: Briarwatch Square
location_briarwatch_square.description: A compact town green beside the bridge, with stone gates, a nearby town hall, and enough open ground for travellers to gather before choosing a road.

location_harrow_forge.name: Harrow's Forge
location_harrow_forge.description: A working timber forge beside the square, with a low awning, tool racks, and a blackened stump used as a quick repair bench.

location_maera_stall.name: Maera's Stall
location_maera_stall.description: A canvas-fronted peddler stall built against a wooden shop, stacked with travel goods, spare cord, sealed jars, and weatherproof map scraps.
